---
title: "pums_single_year_data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## PUMS Census Data

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tibble)   

```

```{r}
# Build API URL with server‑side filters
.load_pums_url <- function(year = 2023,
                           numeric_vars = c("AGEP"),
                           categorical_vars = c("SEX"),
                           geography = c("All","Region","Division","State"),
                           subset = list(),
                           survey = "acs1",
                           key = NULL) {

  geography <- match.arg(geography)
    key_safe  <- if (is.null(key)) "" else as.character(key)

  #TODO add year validation check 
  # TODO add geo validation check 
  # TODO add key validation check 
  
# Print everything with print()
print(paste("year =", year))
print(paste("numeric_vars =", paste(numeric_vars, collapse = ", ")))
print(paste("categorical_vars =", paste(categorical_vars, collapse = ", ")))
print(paste("geo =", geo))
print(paste("subset =", subset))
print(paste("key =", if (nzchar(key)) "Avaiable" else "Missing"))
  

# compose GET fields
get_fields <- unique(c("PWGTP", numeric_vars, categorical_vars))
params <- list(get = paste(get_fields, collapse = ","))


if (nzchar(key_safe)) params$key <- key_safe

base <- paste("https://api.census.gov/data",
              as.character(year), "acs", survey, "pums", sep = "/")

httr::modify_url(base, query = params)

}

```

```{r}
# Add comments
.get_pums_tibble <- function(url, show_call = FALSE) {
  if (isTRUE(show_call)) print(paste("PUMS URL:", url))


  resp <- httr::GET(url)
  httr::stop_for_status(resp)

  parsed <- jsonlite::fromJSON(rawToChar(resp$content))
  hdr <- parsed[1, ]
  df  <- as.data.frame(parsed[-1, ], stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  names(df) <- hdr
  tibble::as_tibble(df, .name_repair = "minimal")
}

```

```{r}
year <- 2023
numeric_vars <- c("AGEP", "JWMNP")
categorical_vars <- c("SEX")
geography <- "State"            
subset <- list(ST = c(37, 36))  
key <- "2c10d8b7f4f3ca11ddef8ced42f41817fa34d9f7"

url <- .load_pums_url(
  year = year,
  numeric_vars = numeric_vars,
  categorical_vars = categorical_vars,
  geography = geography,
  subset = subset,
  survey = "acs1",
  key = key
)

tbl <- .get_pums_tibble(url, show_call = TRUE)

print(tbl)

```
